rationale: Both papers center on market orientation and its performance implications under dynamic/turbulent conditions: the citing study’s core constructs are market orientation facets, turbulence, and performance, while the cited paper develops a market-oriented culture model linking behaviors to market/financial performance with moderation by market dynamism. Given this strong conceptual overlap and an exact DOI match (10.1509/jmkr.37.4.449.18786), this does not look like a clearly incidental mention.
